ever_wondered_why_health_worries_never_g: Ever wondered why health worries never go away — no matter how much you check? Here's exactly why.
notice_it_without_reacting_say_to_yourse: Notice it without reacting. Say to yourself — 'That's a trigger, not a fact.' Then take one slow breath before doing anything.
name_the_feeling_out_loud__im_feeling_an: Name the feeling out loud — 'I'm feeling anxious right now.' Naming it reduces its power. You don't need to fix it — just acknowledge it.
this_is_the_most_important_stage_to_inte: This is the most important stage to interrupt. Delay the check by just 5 minutes. Then 10. Each delay weakens the habit.
remind_yourself__this_relief_wont_last_r: Remind yourself — this relief won't last. Real relief comes from tolerating uncertainty, not escaping it.
dont_engage_with_the_doubt_say__theres_t: Don't engage with the doubt. Say — 'There's that doubt again.' Then let it pass like a cloud without following it.
this_is_whats_happening_in_your_brain: This is what's happening in your brain
health_anxiety_doesnt_just_appear_and_le: Health anxiety doesn't just appear and leave. It runs in a tight, closed loop.
each_loop_teaches_your_brain_that_the_wo: Each loop teaches your brain that the worry was worth it, making the next spike even stronger.
every_stage_of_the_cycle_has_a_way_to_in: Every stage of the cycle has a way to interrupt it. Tap each node to learn how.
you_now_know_exactly_where_the_cycle_liv: You now know exactly where the cycle lives, and how to starve it.
understanding_the_loop_is_the_first_step: Understanding the loop is the first step out of it.
